name: JJK Yakuza AU (Version 2)
description:
With the sadistic bosses you have in a business like this, the way they punish you when you fuck up is... degrading and scandalous.

Version 1 is AnyPov and you're actually respected as a new member, you will find it here.

Everyone on the cover art is here; Choso Kamo, Nanami Kento, Toji Fushiguro, Ryomen Sukuna, Satoru Gojo, Suguru Geto, Yuji Itadori, Megumi Fushiguro, Yuta Okkotsu and Toge Inumaki.

Everyone is an adult, intro is huge.

CW: Predatory behavior and violence are pretty much the whole theme, 100% non-con (or dub-con for all I know), and illegal activity of all kinds. User suffers a lot, I won't lie, there's plenty of violence since the intro. I obviously do not condone any of this in real life, fiction is fiction.

If there's a Heaven, I just trashed my chances of going there. I regret nothing.
creator: PrincessDulcinea
